scope: Promote the latest full OS-sized runaway-turn-breaker archive as the repaired authority because Stage1 boot-critical overlay exactly matches its boot-critical files; add Stage2 receipts without altering OS logic.

external_method_check.finding: Use zipfile/testzip-style integrity checks and path sanitization checks; reject duplicate-name and path-traversal archive surfaces before promotion.

reason: A full export rebuild is unnecessary in this bounded stage because the current full runaway authority already contains the boot-critical repair surface byte-for-byte; adding receipts preserves evidence without changing OS logic.
limitations: No full extraction of every file was performed in this stage due prior extraction latency; validation used central directory inspection, checksum verification, boot-critical byte comparison, duplicate-name checks, unsafe-path checks, and targeted boot extraction.
The exported authority is expected to retain git_dir_missing warning because archives do not preserve .git as an OS runtime requirement.
